title: CopilotKit Blank-Page Fix + OAuth Migration to Magic-Link Auth
summary: Applied two critical fixes from the protein-truth-desk backend development history. (1) CopilotKit blank-page fix: lazy-loaded the 3.5MB CopilotSidebar bundle via React.lazy()+Suspense in App.tsx so React mounts immediately without waiting for the full CopilotKit bundle. Also removed a duplicate QueryClientProvider that would have caused tRPC hooks to see two separate caches. (2) OAuth migration: replaced all api.manus.im OAuth redirects with a local magic-link email auth system that works inside Cloud Run without VPC egress.

root_cause_fixed.copilotkit_blank_page: CopilotSidebar was imported synchronously, causing React to wait for the 3.5MB bundle before mounting. Fixed by React.lazy() + Suspense.
root_cause_fixed.oauth_enotfound: api.manus.im is unreachable from Cloud Run containers (no VPC egress). Every auth redirect failed with ENOTFOUND. Fixed by replacing OAuth redirects with local magic-link JWT auth.

files_changed: client/src/App.tsx — lazy-load CopilotSidebar, remove duplicate QueryClientProvider, mount GlobalSignInDialog
client/src/main.tsx — use openSignInDialog() on UNAUTHORIZED instead of OAuth redirect
client/src/components/DashboardLayout.tsx — use openSignInDialog() on sign-in button
server/db.ts — add magic-link DB helpers (create, findValid, markUsed, countRecent)
server/magicLink.test.ts — NEW: 8 tests for magic-link endpoints

db_migration.security: Never store raw token. Mark on first use. Rate limit: 5 tokens per email per 10 minutes. TTL: 15 minutes.

auth_flow.request: POST /api/auth/magic-link/request { email } → rate-check → generate 32-byte random token → store SHA-256 hash → send link via Manus notification (prod) or console.log (dev) → return { ok: true }
auth_flow.verify: GET /api/auth/magic-link/verify?token=<raw> → hash → find valid record → mark used → upsertUser(openId='email_<sha256>', loginMethod='magic_link') → createSessionToken → set cookie → redirect /
auth_flow.openId_prefix: email_<sha256> — never calls api.manus.im, fully local JWT

known_limitations.email_delivery: In production, magic links are sent via Manus owner notification (not directly to the requesting user's inbox). A transactional email provider (SendGrid/Resend) should be wired in server/magicLink.ts sendMagicLinkEmail() for full user-facing delivery.
known_limitations.manus_oauth: Original OAuth callback at /api/oauth/callback is preserved for backward compatibility but is effectively unused since api.manus.im is unreachable from Cloud Run.

pending_next: Publish checkpoint 371cece4 to production via Management UI Publish button
Wire transactional email provider (SendGrid/Resend) for user-facing magic-link delivery
Add 'Recently verified' section to homepage using registry API
